## Nebius Group raises $775M to accelerate AI cloud buildout

A $775M raise by a focused AI cloud builder confirms capital continues to flow aggressively into AI infrastructure, validating the datacenter buildout theme. For the portfolio, NBIS is a purer-play capex signal; execution on deploying this raise is the next thesis checkpoint.

- NBIS closed a $775M capital raise with proceeds directed at accelerating AI cloud infrastructure expansion.
- Signals continued institutional appetite for dedicated AI infrastructure capacity.
- Raise is a direct datacenter buildout pacing signal — NBIS is investing ahead of demand curve.
- No investor names, terms, or dilution details specified in the headline.
- Positive framing from SimplyWall.st coverage.
